info.name: AI Presentation Generator
info.description:
Send a plain English prompt and the AI builds the entire presentation.

Two ways to generate:
1. POST /generate (blocking) — runs the whole pipeline and returns the finished PDF + slide JSON in one response.
2. POST /jobs (streaming, Phase 0) — Gamma-style slide-by-slide generation over Server-Sent Events: emits `outline` (deck skeleton + shared CSS) in ~9s, then one `slide` event per slide as each finishes (parallel, so out-of-order is expected), then `done` with a deckId. Render the per-slide `html` fragments with the `css` from the outline event. Export is a separate step: POST /export with the deckId.

Required field: prompt
Optional fields:
- noOfSlides (default: 15, min: 5, max: 21)
- deckType: pitch_deck | strategy_deck | case_study | testimonial | social_post | course | proposal | general (default: general — infers type from the prompt, same as before this field existed)
- theme: corporate | funky | minimal | academic (default: corporate — today's original look)
- canvas: widescreen_16_9 | square_1_1 | vertical_9_16 (default: widescreen_16_9, or square_1_1 automatically when deckType is social_post)
- accentColor: a preset name (blue | green | purple | amber | rose | teal) OR a custom hex code (e.g. "#2563EB") — overrides the chosen theme's accent color (cards, badges, numbers, donut rings) and the color language used in AI-generated illustrations, while keeping that theme's font/spacing/radius identity. Omit to use the theme's default accent.
- watermark (true/false) — opt-in footer badge.

Note: square_1_1 / vertical_9_16 canvases are only supported with deckType "social_post" — the other deck types use layouts designed for widescreen and will return a 400 if you ask for a different canvas.

Base URL: http://localhost:8080 (the server listens on 8080; the 'Port 8000' startup log is a cosmetic bug).

variable.description: Paste the deckId from a /jobs `done` event, then run Export Deck.

item.name: Course / Training on a Topic (academic theme)

body.raw:
{
  "prompt": "Fun Instagram carousel announcing our new cold brew coffee flavor, with a punchy hook, a couple of quick reasons to love it, and a call to action to shop now.",
  "noOfSlides": 5,
  "deckType": "social_post",
  "theme": "funky",
  "canvas": "square_1_1"
}

{
  "prompt": "Instagram/TikTok story announcing our new cold brew coffee flavor, with a punchy hook, a couple of quick reasons to love it, and a call to action to shop now.",
  "noOfSlides": 5,
  "deckType": "social_post",
  "theme": "funky",
  "canvas": "vertical_9_16"
}

{
  "prompt": "Pitch deck for our AI startup helping doctors detect cancer earlier using MRI scans.",
  "noOfSlides": 10,
  "deckType": "pitch_deck",
  "theme": "corporate",
  "accentColor": "blue"
}

{
  "prompt": "Sales proposal for Prudential Zambia to deploy our WhatsApp commerce platform across their policyholder base.",
  "noOfSlides": 10,
  "deckType": "proposal",
  "theme": "corporate",
  "accentColor": "#16A34A"
}

item.name: Streaming Engine (Phase 0)
item.description: Gamma-style slide-by-slide generation (SSE) and on-demand export.

request.description: Renders an already-generated deck (by deckId from a /jobs `done` event) to a file. Returns { deckId, format, pdfPath }. Only `pdf` is implemented in Phase 0; `pptx`/`gslides` come in Phase 3.
